meanings.definition: a Shiite terrorist organization with strong ties to Iran; seeks to create an Iranian fundamentalist Islamic state in Lebanon; car bombs are the signature weapon
synonyms: Islamic Jihad for the Liberation of Palestine
Organization of the Oppressed on Earth

meanings.definition: an Islamic extremist group active since the late 1970s; seeks to overthrow the Egyptian government and replace it with an Islamic state; works in small underground cells
examples: the original Jihad was responsible for the assassination of Anwar Sadat in 1981
